comp.posthire.candObs: The collaborator is in a stable state. Asynchronous tools are correctly configured. One friction point was identified: meetings without prior agenda. The mentor is working with HR to implement a structured format.
about.orgsSub: The project is supported by communities and organizations that provide visibility, accompaniment, and a practical inclusion perspective.

vacancies.title: Junior Data Analyst
vacancies.desc: Database analysis, report generation, and key metrics visualization. Quiet work environment, small team of 6 people.
vacancies.companyDesc: Data analysis company with 7 years in the market. Results-oriented work culture, not presence-oriented.

vacancies.title: UX Designer
vacancies.desc: Digital experience design for health and education clients. 3 days remote, 2 in office with individual desk.
vacancies.companyDesc: Boutique design studio focusing on digital accessibility. 45 employees, flexible environment.

mentors.name: Carmen Ruiz
mentors.bio: Organizational psychologist specializing in labor insertion strategies for profiles with diverse cognitive styles. Certified in professional transition accompaniment.

mentors.name: David Morales
mentors.bio: Inclusion consultant with experience in company-candidate mediation. Has accompanied more than 60 successful adaptive hiring processes.

compCandsData.strengths: High focus on detailed tasks. Prefers quiet environments. Requires written instructions.
Excellent tolerance to variable environments. High multitasking ability. Fluent verbal communication.

aboutPage.purposeBody: Ensuring employment is a right, not a privilege. We facilitate inclusive labor insertion by accompanying neurodivergent individuals to enhance their capabilities and helping companies build spaces where all ways of thinking and learning are valued.
aboutPage.missionBody: Being the bridge between neurodivergent talent and companies committed to inclusion. Through our platform: we train and accompany candidates; we sensitize organizations to achieve more equitable selection processes. Key note: We do not adapt people to exclusionary systems; we transform workspaces to harness the richness of cognitive diversity.
aboutPage.visionBody: By 2036, to be the leading platform in labor inclusion and neurodiversity. We envision a world without barriers or prejudices, where cognitive diversity is recognized as an engine for innovation and creativity. We aspire to a society where each person finds dignified employment that drives their well-being and autonomy, and where companies offer more human and accessible environments for all.

preparar.title: PREPARE
preparar.body: At Astris we prepare individuals to face the work environment with confidence. Through training tools, simulations, and self-knowledge, we enhance their skills and provide them with the foundation for successful incorporation. We believe knowledge and preparation are the first step towards sustainable insertion. It is not about fitting into a mold, but discovering and strengthening each person's unique capabilities so they can shine in the right environment.

adaptar.title: ADAPT
adaptar.body: Technology should adapt to people, not the other way around. That is why we offer a customizable interface with accessible color palettes, light and dark modes, and sensory adjustments. Each user configures the platform according to their needs, eliminating visual and cognitive barriers from the very first moment. Furthermore, companies define the adjustments they can offer before starting any process, ensuring the environment is ready to welcome diverse talent.

acompanar.title: ACCOMPANY
acompanar.body: Human accompaniment is essential for successful insertion. We assign specialized mentors who guide candidates from preparation through post-hire tracking. Our mentors understand neurodiversity and facilitate communication between talent and companies, ensuring both parties feel supported at every stage of the process. Accompaniment doesn't end with hiring: we monitor adaptation during the first 60 to 90 days.

conectar.title: CONNECT
conectar.body: Connecting talent with opportunities is our ultimate goal. Our matching system cross-references profiles based on skills and environmental needs — not on diagnoses — to find real matches. This way we ensure the person and the work environment are compatible, generating lasting and successful relationships. Companies access anonymous profiles with objective compatibility data, without names, photos, or clinical information.

aboutPage.ctaBody: Whether you are talent looking for your ideal place or a company committed to real inclusion, you will find the way at Astris.

pillars.title: Prepare
pillars.body: We characterize how each person works and what environment they need. No diagnoses, no clinical labels.

pillars.title: Adapt
pillars.body: The company defines exactly what adjustments it can offer before starting any selection process.

pillars.title: Accompany
pillars.body: A human mentor guides the candidate and the company throughout the entire process, from the match to day 60.

pillars.title: Connect
pillars.body: The system cross-references profiles and suggests real compatibilities, not perceptions. Both parties know what to expect.

problems: Standard selection processes are not designed to evaluate talent — they are designed to filter out differences.
Over 85% of working-age individuals with diverse cognitive styles are unemployed or underemployed, not due to lack of capabilities, but lack of compatibility.
Conventional interviews, unadapted environments, and ambiguous communication systematically exclude high-potential profiles.
A failed hire due to the absence of reasonable adjustments costs between 3 and 5 times the role's annual salary.

how.desc: The candidate characterizes their work style across 4 axes. The company documents its environment and available adjustments.
The system cross-references both profiles and suggests compatibilities with a visible percentage for the candidate.
The mentor accompanies the preparation for the selection process, adapted to the candidate and the company.
Post-hire, the mentor monitors adaptation during the first 60 to 90 days of the new role.

compare.astris: How they work best and what the environment needs
Calculated by the system with objective data
Defined and committed from the start

impactCand: 60% reduction in time searching for a compatible job
Access to roles that genuinely fit their work style
Accompaniment from the first day of the process
No need to reveal medical diagnoses at any time
impactComp: Access to highly specialized and motivated talent
40% reduction in turnover during the first 6 months
Clear legal framework to implement reasonable adjustments
Continuous advisory from the mentor during the entire integration period
privacyTitle: Your privacy is the foundation, not an add-on.
privacyBody: No medical diagnosis is stored or shared. Companies never see real names or photographs — only anonymous compatibility profiles. The candidate controls what information is visible at each stage.
postHireQ1: How was your week in terms of comfort in the work environment?
postHireQ2: Was there anything that caused difficulty or discomfort?

postHireHistory.note: Positive first week. Asynchronous tools correctly configured.
Onboarding completed. Accompaniment plan agreed upon with mentor.
